quoteText.en: We propose a new simple network architecture, the Transformer, based solely on attention mechanisms, dispensing with recurrence and convolutions entirely.
quoteText.zh: 我们提出一种新的简单网络架构 Transformer，完全基于注意力机制。

quotePage.en: Attention Is All You Need abstract
quotePage.zh: 《注意力就是你所需要的一切》摘要
